# antonlebed.com — The Primordial Rose
# Mathematical framework: physical constants from the ring Z/970200Z
# 113 pages rendered by .ax via WASM. CC0 public domain. All code runs in browser.
# Author: Anton Alexandrovich Lebed
# Source: https://github.com/antonlebed/antonlebed.com

## What this is
A single algebraic structure — the ring Z/970200Z = Z/8 × Z/9 × Z/25 × Z/49 × Z/11 —
from which physical constants, biological scaling laws, error correction codes, and
cryptographic protocols can be derived with zero free parameters. Every claim is
computed live in the browser via .ax (a self-compiling language that targets WASM).
No backend, no API, no frameworks. Pure arithmetic.

## Start here
- /basics/tutorial: 10 guided challenges — learn .ax from nothing to everything
- /basics/story: Full narrative — ten terms, 108 rings, one heartbeat
- /basics/derive: Derive everything from 0/0 in 10 steps
- /basics/worldview: 29 paradigm shifts, each verifiable
- /living/repl: Live .ax REPL — write and run .ax code in browser

## Physics (all verified to measured values)
- /data/alpha: Fine structure constant — 7-term formula, sub-ppb accuracy
- /data/particles: Particle masses from eigenvalue spectrum
- /data/constants: Gravitational, Boltzmann, Planck — all derived
- /data/cosmo: CMB temperature, dark energy fraction
- /data/turbulence: Kolmogorov -5/3 = -E/K (exact), Kleiber 3/4 = K/D² (exact)
- /data/nuclear: Nuclear binding energy, QCD coupling
- /data/pmns: Neutrino mixing from ring structure

## Biology
- /data/dna: Genetic code structure in the ring
- /data/sleep: Sleep stages as CRT channel locking
- /observe/heart: Cardiac rhythm from D²×K=12 trinity heart
- /data/human_shape: Human body proportions from five primes

## Mathematics
- /deep/lattice: 108-ring lattice, lambda=420 invariant
- /deep/spectrum: Eigenvalue spectrum and spectral gap
- /deep/algebra: Ring structure and idempotents
- /deep/modular_forms: Modular forms from ring structure
- /deep/monster_moonshine: Monster group connections
- /deep/geometry: CRT geometry and topology

## Interactive (visitors can compute in browser)
- /living/repl: .ax REPL — compile and run .ax code live
- /basics/tutorial: 10 guided challenges with live code execution
- /observe/crt_anatomy: CRT explorer — decompose any number
- /observe/coupling: Coupling analyzer — see channel structure
- /observe/ecc_live: Error correction — corrupt bits, watch them heal
- /observe/emergence: Artificial life from 3 boolean operations
- /observe/eigenvalue_swim: Walk the eigenvalue landscape
- /deep/algebra: Ring calculator (interactive)

## Key claims (all computable in the REPL)
- Ring: 970200 = 2³ × 3² × 5² × 7² × 11
- Five primes: D=2, K=3, E=5, b=7, L=11
- Lambda: 420 = LCM(1..7), shared by 108 rings
- Phi: 201600 = phi(970200) units
- OMEGA: 606376 = 2^420 mod 970200, idempotent projector
- Kolmogorov exponent: -5/3 = -E/K (exact)
- Kleiber exponent: 3/4 = K/D² (exact)
- Fine structure: 7-term formula from ring eigenvalues
- Self-compiling .ax language: .ax → WASM → browser → this website

## Technical
- .ax language compiles to WASM. site.wasm (7.8MB) renders all 113 pages
- Server-side rendering: same .ax code outputs HTML for crawlers
- 16 DOM imports: .ax talks to browser directly, no JS intermediary
- 114 interactive widgets + live REPL across 108 pages
- .ax REPL: 30 examples (Hello to Lattice), deep_ouroboros.wasm compiler, ~1ms compile
- CC0 public domain — no copyright, no restrictions
- 6 categories: basics, observe, data, teach, deep, living
